about:
I'm a passionate mobile app and backend developer specializing in React Native, Go, and cloud services. 
 With a strong focus on crafting seamless user experiences, I bring a unique blend of skills in UI/UX design, Firebase, CI/CD, and SEO.
My journey also includes hands-on experience in native app development using Kotlin (Jetpack Compose) for Android and Swift for iOS.
I thrive on solving complex challenges and building performant, scalable applications that not only work well but feel great to use.
Whether it’s shipping pixel-perfect UIs or optimizing backend logic, I’m all about creating tech that makes a difference.
